questions.question: What is the primary objective of Mahatma Gandhi Gram Swaraj Initiative (MGGSI)?

options.label: B
options.text: Build rural self-reliance in khadi, handloom, and handicrafts

options.label: D
options.text: Promote Information Technology (IT) startups in rural areas

answer.label: B
answer.text: Build rural self-reliance in khadi, handloom, and handicrafts

questions.explanation: The Mahatma Gandhi Gram Swaraj Initiative (MGGSI) aims to build rural self-reliance in khadi, handloom, and handicrafts and to promote employment-oriented growth through development of scalable, export-oriented rural enterprises. It supports local weavers, artisans, and rural youth by creating backward and forward linkages across value chains and aligns with the One District One Product (ODOP) initiative. The Office of the Development Commissioner (Handicrafts) implements the National Handicrafts Development Programme (NHDP) and Comprehensive Handicrafts Cluster Development Scheme (CHCDS), providing skill development, marketing, cluster development, infrastructure, and technology support to artisans.

questions.question: Gurjant Singh, who recently announced his retirement in March 2026, is associated with which sports?
questions.explanation: Indian men’s hockey team forward Gurjant Singh announced his retirement from international hockey at the Hockey India Awards in New Delhi. Gurjant Singh is 31 years old and has had a career spanning nearly a decade, earning 130 international caps and scoring 33 goals. He was part of the Indian teams that won Olympic bronze medals at Tokyo 2020 and Paris 2024. Gurjant also contributed to India winning gold at the 2022 Hangzhou Asian Games, 2017 Asia Cup, and multiple Asian Champions Trophy titles. In 2021, he was awarded the Arjuna Award, one of India’s highest sporting honours.

questions.question: Which country launched the world’s first dedicated freight-only Shinkansen (bullet train)?
questions.explanation: Japan has launched the world’s first dedicated high-speed freight bullet train, marking a major innovation in logistics and transportation. The initiative has been undertaken by the East Japan Railway Company, which has converted a passenger bullet train into a cargo-only Shinkansen. The project is based on the E3 Series Shinkansen, whose interiors have been redesigned by removing seats and creating open cargo space with reinforced flooring and securing systems.

questions.question: A new butterfly species Euthalia zubeengargi has been discovered in which state?
questions.explanation: A new butterfly species Euthalia zubeengargi has been discovered in Arunachal Pradesh. It belongs to the genus Euthalia, commonly found in South and Southeast Asia. It lives in semi-evergreen forests at elevations of 600–750 metres. It prefers cool, shaded forest interiors for survival. It has earthy brown wings with pale spots, typical of this group. It rests on low vegetation and feeds on tree sap and minerals near streams. It is active from late morning to early afternoon, making short slow flights.

questions.question: The upgraded Integrated Disease Surveillance Programme (IDSP) was launched by which ministry?

options.label: B
options.text: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

answer.label: B
answer.text: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

questions.explanation: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare (MoHFW – Ministry of Health and Family Welfare) launched upgraded IDSP (Integrated Disease Surveillance Programme). IDSP (Integrated Disease Surveillance Programme) started in 2004 under NHM (National Health Mission), tracks infectious diseases and outbreaks. The upgrade focuses on early detection and real-time surveillance of bio-threats. It now covers bio-emergencies, bio-warfare, and bio-terrorism preparedness.

questions.question: Who won the 2026 Miami Open tennis title?
questions.explanation: Jannik Sinner defeated Jiri Lehecka 6-4, 6-4 to win the Miami Open, completing the ‘Sunshine Double’ by winning both Indian Wells and Miami in the same season. He became the first man since Roger Federer in 2017 to achieve the Sunshine Double and the first player to do so without dropping a set across both events. At 24 years old, Sinner won Indian Wells for the first time, becoming the eighth man to complete the Sunshine Double, joining Jim Courier, Michael Chang, Pete Sampras, Marcelo Rios, Andre Agassi, Roger Federer, and Novak Djokovic.

questions.question: Navegaon Nagzira Tiger Reserve is located in which state?
questions.explanation: Navegaon Nagzira Tiger Reserve took control of its notified buffer area, strengthening conservation management. It is located in Maharashtra and forms part of the Central Indian Tiger Landscape, which supports nearly one-sixth of India’s tiger population. The reserve was declared in 2013 and is the fifth tiger reserve in Maharashtra. It comprises multiple protected areas, including Nawegaon National Park, Nawegaon Wildlife Sanctuary, Nagzira Wildlife Sanctuary, New Nagzira Wildlife Sanctuary, and Koka Wildlife Sanctuary.

questions.question: Mahi Banswara Atomic Nuclear Power Project is located in which state?
questions.explanation: Atomic Energy Regulatory Board approved excavation for Units 1 & 2 of Mahi Banswara Rajasthan Atomic Nuclear Power Project. It is located in Banswara, Rajasthan, near Mahi Dam on Mahi River. It is developed by Anushakti Vidhyut Nigam Limited, a joint venture of Nuclear Power Corporation of India Limited and National Thermal Power Corporation Limited. It is part of India’s “fleet mode” initiative—standardized construction of 10 identical 700 megawatt reactors for efficiency.

questions.question: Rebate of State and Central Taxes and Levies (RoSCTL) Scheme is related to which sector?
questions.explanation: The Ministry of Textiles has extended the Rebate of State and Central Taxes and Levies (RoSCTL) Scheme for exports of apparel, garments, and made-ups up to 30th September 2026 to promote textile exports. The RoSCTL Scheme has been operational since 2019 and aims to enhance the competitiveness of Indian textile exports in the global market. The scheme provides reimbursement of all embedded State and Central taxes and levies that are not otherwise refunded under any other mechanism. The RoSCTL Scheme was introduced as a successor to the Rebate of State Levies (RoSL) Scheme, which covered only State taxes and levies.

questions.question: Where was Kaynes semiconductor plant inaugurated in April 2026?
questions.explanation: Prime Minister Narendra Modi inaugurated a Kaynes semiconductor plant at Sanand, Gujarat. The plant is set up by Kaynes Technology as an Outsourced Semiconductor Assembly and Test (OSAT) facility. It is established under the India Semiconductor Mission. The facility manufactures Intelligent Power Modules (IPMs) used in electric vehicles, automotive, and industrial automation. It marks India’s entry into the global semiconductor value chain and boosts high-tech manufacturing.
